creator: ladyandhersweetescapes
caption:
Have you tried Emirati cuisine in Dubai? Here’s our go-to restaurant whenever we have visitors or simple when we crave for one.

📍 @alfanarrestaurant in @alseefdubai 
❤️ Michelin Guide-approved
🤎 Homey setting with a gorgeous view of the creek
🍛 Delicious comfort food. You’ll never go wrong with fish or chicken machboos, luqaimat and karak. If you’re dining with a group, they have reasonably priced sharing platters.
✨ Approximate spend for 2: AED 150

Save this for your next dining experience.

Dubai Restaurant • Emirate Restaurant • Al Fanar Restaurant • Al Seef Dubai • Dubai • Lady and her Sweet Escapes
